metric_caveats: This diagnostic validation cap is a gating check for Qwen3.6:35b ExECT S0/S1 replication; it is not a performance estimate.
These are partial ExECT S0/S1 diagnostics, not published ExECTv2 benchmark reproduction.
Cap-25 ExECT runs are systematically optimistic vs full validation (~7–9pp on S1 with GPT); treat as schema and drift signal only.
GPT 4.1-mini frozen dev anchor: runs/exect_s0_s1_validation_full_gpt4_1_mini_20260519T221944Z (92.3% micro F1, 40 validation).
This config intentionally avoids ChainOfThought, BootstrapFewShot, and GEPA per docs/qwen_dspy_latency_policy.md.
Do not compare this run to GPT cap-25 or full validation as the same experiment.
Record local Ollama GPU residency or RAM offload when inspecting artifacts.
Evidence quote support should be reported both overall and split between exact model quotes and ellipsis bridge repairs.
